name: Reuben Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté onion and celery in butter until tender.
2. Add broth and baking soda.
3. Combine cornstarch and water; stir into the pan. Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
4. Reduce heat. Add sauerkraut, cream, and corned beef; simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Stir in cheese until melted.
6. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Garnish with croutons if desired. Serves: 6 (1 1/2 quarts)
